response.justification: The candidate lacks the required 8 years of C++ experience and 5 years of large-scale infrastructure/cloud compute platform design; their work is heavily focused on web, mobile, and scripting languages (TypeScript, Node.js, DLang) with minimal evidence of production-grade C++ systems or cloud compute leadership, and their leadership experience is more community- or tooling-oriented than technical team leadership in cloud infrastructure.
strengths: Strong full-stack versatility with diverse language and platform experience
Active open-source contributor and technical educator with workshops and talks
Demonstrated ability to build and deploy distributed systems (Kubernetes, CI/CD, microservices)
concerns: No clear evidence of 8+ years of C++ programming as required
Lacks documented experience with cloud compute platforms (AWS/GCP/Azure infrastructure at scale)
Leadership roles are primarily tooling, community, or individual contributor, not team technical leadership in cloud infrastructure
